column2: Verify AI Component Hazard Identification and Mitigation
column3: ['Set up a new AI component with potential hazards. ', 'Request the system to identify and pass any new hazards introduced by this AI component back up to system-level safety processes for mitigation as derived requirements. ', 'Verify that all passed hazards are complete, accurate, and actionable. ']
column4: ['The AI component is successfully set up, and it contains known potential hazards. ', 'The system correctly identifies and passes all new hazards introduced by the AI component to higher-level safety processes for further analysis.
